subject: A feline-humanoid warrior in gold armor leaping over fallen undead enemies, discharging purple necromantic energy
description: A cat-like humanoid figure in elaborate gold plate armor leaps dynamically above a pair of defeated undead or zombie-like enemies. One arm is raised high in a triumphant or commanding gesture while the other arm channels a burst of purple-violet magical energy directed downward at the fallen foes. The setting is a dark cavernous or tunnel environment with grey-green stone walls. The figure's feline face shows exposed fangs in an expression of dominance. The armor is ornate with leaf or petal motifs. The fallen enemies in the foreground are grey-toned and grotesque.
foreground: gold-armored cat-humanoid warrior leaping over fallen undead, arm raised, purple energy discharging
background: dark stone cavern or tunnel, grey-green walls
